results.baseline: Q @ K.T / sqrt(d_k) -> softmax -> @ V using torch.matmul + torch.softmax
results.notes: Uses FlashAttention-2 CPU path. Zero-effort drop-in replacement. GPU analog should be 10-50x+ for long seqs.
T=8 shows anomalous regression. T=20 worse than T=16. Optimal is 16 on this 20-core machine.

results.description: Vectorized batched GEMM over (B,H,N,D) vs Python loop over heads
results.baseline: Python loop: [head_gemm(q[h], k[h]) for h in range(H)]
results.optimized: torch.bmm or torch.matmul on full (B,H,N,D) tensor
results.notes: Eliminates Python overhead for head-wise operations.

results.description: Optimal batch size B*=8 for 50ms SLA
results.notes: B=8 gives 2x throughput vs B=1 while staying under 50ms SLA. B=32 exceeds latency budget.

results.description: Memory layout C vs F order for numpy/PyTorch
results.notes: Only 1.09x. OpenBLAS handles layout internally. Not significant below 1.10x threshold.
CATASTROPHICALLY slower (0.002x = 500x overhead). CPU lacks Tensor Core hardware for INT8. Valid only on H100 GPU.

gpu_priorities: FP8 attention (H5/H1) - H100 FP8 Tensor Cores
conclusion.baseline_recommendation: Use torch.SDPA (FA2 path), NOT naive torch.matmul, as GPU attention baseline
